instructor.name: Roy Getz
instructor.title: Expert EOS Implementer
instructor.bio: Roy Getz is an Expert EOS Implementer with over 40 years of leading and managing people. With 650+ full-day EOS sessions under his belt, Roy brings passion, energy, and authenticity to every workshop — sharing real-life successes and failures to help leaders build stronger, more cohesive organizations.

agenda.description: Master the essential practices that separate great bosses from average managers.
Learn the day-to-day management disciplines that drive accountability and results.
Network with fellow leaders and discuss real-world challenges over lunch.
The structured conversation framework that replaces painful annual reviews with meaningful check-ins.
Walk away with practical tools and a concrete plan you can implement Monday morning.

painPoints.headline: Your best people keep leaving
painPoints.description: You invest in hiring great talent, but they leave within 18 months because they don't feel developed or challenged.

painPoints.headline: Accountability feels like micromanaging
painPoints.description: You know your team needs more accountability, but every attempt feels like you're breathing down their necks.

painPoints.headline: Annual reviews are dreaded by everyone
painPoints.description: The annual review process consumes weeks and produces nothing actionable. Both you and your team dread it.

painPoints.headline: You're doing their job instead of yours
painPoints.description: You spend more time fixing your team's problems than leading. You're the bottleneck, and you know it.

faq.question: Who is this workshop for?
faq.answer: Any leader, manager, or boss who wants to build a more accountable, high-performing team. Whether you run a company or manage a department, you'll leave with practical tools you can use immediately.

faq.question: Do I need to be running EOS to attend?
faq.answer: No. While the workshop uses EOS terminology and frameworks, the leadership and management practices are universal and valuable for any organization.

faq.question: What is your refund policy?
faq.answer: Full refund if you cancel 14+ days before the workshop. 50% refund for cancellations 7–13 days out. No refunds within 7 days of the event, but you may send a substitute attendee at no extra charge.

faq.question: What should I bring?
faq.answer: Just yourself and an open mind. All materials, workbooks, and the Great Boss Toolkit are provided. Lunch is included.

faq.question: Why are there two prices?
faq.answer: We pass through the ~3% credit card processing fee to keep the base price as low as possible. Pay by bank transfer (ACH) to get the lower price — it's fast, secure, and saves you money.

faq.question: How many people attend each workshop?
faq.answer: Workshops are capped at 25 attendees to ensure a hands-on, interactive experience with plenty of time for individual questions and discussion.

testimonials.quote: This workshop completely changed how I lead my team. The Quarterly Conversations framework alone was worth the investment.
testimonials.author: Workshop Attendee
testimonials.title: CEO

testimonials.quote: Roy's energy is contagious. I left with a clear action plan and the confidence to implement it. My team noticed the difference within weeks.
testimonials.author: Workshop Attendee
testimonials.title: VP of Operations

testimonials.quote: I've been managing people for 20 years and still learned more in one day than I did in years of trial and error.
testimonials.author: Workshop Attendee
testimonials.title: Director of Engineering

meta.description: Work alongside an EOS Implementer and other bosses to learn how to develop more accountable, high-performing teams. Led by Roy Getz, Expert EOS Implementer with 650+ sessions.
